content: 如題，被棄掉的會卡在畫面上

Hi all,

There are a lot of us players that think this sub should have a few more mods. 

Could you please look into applications for the asia region, europe and americas? It's nice to have mods that are online at the same time that player are on. 

Thank you.

请问一下 你们很久之前提到的致敬杀戮尖塔的肉鸽 有什么新的进展吗？大概什么时候会出？ 

Hi, may I ask if there have been any updates on the roguelike mode inspired by Slay the Spire that you mentioned quite some time ago? Do you have an estimated release timeline?

Dear Developers and Management Team,

Hello, I am one of the organizers of the Phase Chess tournament in the Korean community.

First of all, the tournament is scheduled to take place on April 4th at 21:00 (Korean Standard Time). You will be able to watch the broadcast through the following link:
https://chzzk.naver.com/d6996e19603476b1ebfde45b43fd05bc

(It should be accessible without requiring registration.)

The tournament will be organized and managed through our Discord server. If you join via the link below, we will grant you administrator permissions so that you can access and review all channels freely:
https://discord.gg/bYJGtYswup

Currently, the game has been officially launched across multiple platforms in Korea, and we are seeing a significant increase in new players joining the community.

We sincerely hope that this tournament will have a positive impact on the growth and popularity of the game.

Thank you very much for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
字體沒有正確呈現而是顯示方框*N
